name: ASUS ROG CROSSHAIR X670E HERO ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - PCIe 5.0 M.2 card
